{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Manager",
  "description": "Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited is a dynamic Human Resource and Business Advisory firm committed to delivering innovative workforce solutions and strategic consulting services to organizations across various industries.&nbsp;&lrm;We specialize in helping businesses attract, develop, manage, and retain top talent while improving operational efficiency and organizational performance.&lrm;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for an experienced Business Manager to lead and oversee the work of employees in our company. You will be responsible for ensuring the efficiency of business operations as well as setting strategic goals for the future.
	The ideal candidate will be well-versed in all matters business.
	They will be a competent leader able to provide guidance that enhances performance in a manner which incorporates the company&rsquo;s vision and culture. The goal will be to ensure the profitability of our company&rsquo;s activities to drive sustainable development and long-term success.


Responsibilities


	Develop goals and objectives that tend to growth and prosperity
	Design and implement business plans and strategies to promote the attainment of goals
	Ensure that the company has the adequate and suitable resources to complete its activities (e.g. people, material, equipment etc.)
	Organize and coordinate operations in ways that ensure maximum productivity
	Supervise the work of employees and provide feedback and counsel to improve efficiency and effectiveness
	Maintain relationships with partners/vendors/suppliers
	Gather, analyze and interpret external and internal data and write reports
	Assess overall company performance against objectives
	Represent the company in events, conferences etc.
	Ensure adherence to legal rules and guidelines.


Requirements


	B.Sc / Ba in Business Management or relevant field;
	B.Sc / MA will be a plus
	Proven experience as business manager or relevant role
	Excellent organizational and leadership skills
	Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities
	Thorough understanding of diverse business processes and strategy development
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office, databases and information systems
	Good understanding of research methods and data analysis techniques.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send his CV to:&nbsp;quadolaadvisoryhrservicesltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Business Manager Job at ?Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited




        
    

        
        Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited is a dynamic Human Resource and Business Advisory firm committed to delivering innovative workforce solutions and strategic consulting services to organizations across various industries. ‎We specialize in helping businesses attract, develop, manage, and retain top talent while improving operational efficiency and organizational performance.‎

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an experienced Business Manager to lead and oversee the work of employees in our company. You will be responsible for ensuring the efficiency of business operations as well as setting strategic goals for the future.
	The ideal candidate will be well-versed in all matters business.
	They will be a competent leader able to provide guidance that enhances performance in a manner which incorporates the company’s vision and culture. The goal will be to ensure the profitability of our company’s activities to drive sustainable development and long-term success.


Responsibilities


	Develop goals and objectives that tend to growth and prosperity
	Design and implement business plans and strategies to promote the attainment of goals
	Ensure that the company has the adequate and suitable resources to complete its activities (e.g. people, material, equipment etc.)
	Organize and coordinate operations in ways that ensure maximum productivity
	Supervise the work of employees and provide feedback and counsel to improve efficiency and effectiveness
	Maintain relationships with partners/vendors/suppliers
	Gather, analyze and interpret external and internal data and write reports
	Assess overall company performance against objectives
	Represent the company in events, conferences etc.
	Ensure adherence to legal rules and guidelines.


Requirements


	B.Sc / Ba in Business Management or relevant field;
	B.Sc / MA will be a plus
	Proven experience as business manager or relevant role
	Excellent organizational and leadership skills
	Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities
	Thorough understanding of diverse business processes and strategy development
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office, databases and information systems
	Good understanding of research methods and data analysis techniques.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send his CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Carrot-Top Drugs Limited
content:
Carrot-Top Drugs Limited was incorporated in 1997. It started business as a retail pharmacy on October 30th, 2000. In 2005, the company started her own brands of innovative and quality fertility products with Predict Ovulation Prediction Kit being her first.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Today, Carrot-Top Drugs Limited is a household name for couples trying for a baby. The company is built on a tripod of hard work, transparency, and commitment to our numerous customers. Our passion for fertility and wellness is borne out of our desire to see couples fulfilled and happy. Our various communication channels are inundated with testimonies of obviously satisfied customers. Our strength is in our skilled, courteous, and very innovative manpower, as well as our distribution capacity which has ensured all our choice brands, can be assessed anywhere in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Medical Sales Representative

Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Candidates must possess a Degree in any of the following disciplines: Human Physiology, Anatomy, Pharmacology, Biochemistry, Microbiology or Biological Sciences.
	Have high moral / ethical standards.
	Willing to take instructions and execute diligently.
	Motivated by extra money to be made legitimately in the field.
	Must be proficient in Driving.
	Must be resident in any of these parts of Lagos Mainland; Abule-Egbe, Aboru, Meiran, Oko-Oba, Alagbado, Ayobo, Ijon Village, Agege, Iyana Ipaja, Dopemu, Egbeda, Idimu, Akowonjo, Isheri Olofin, Shasha, Iju, Agbado Ijaye, Command, Fagba, Ijaiye, Ogba, Akute, Sango-Ota, Akiode, Omole Phase 1, Agindingbi, Ojodu, Berger, Ikeja, Maryland, Mende, Anthony. 


Application Closing Date: 31st May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Medical Sales Representative

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Candidates must possess a Degree in any of the following disciplines: Human Physiology, Anatomy, Pharmacology, Biochemistry, Microbiology or Biological Sciences.
	Have high moral / ethical standards.
	Willing to take instructions and execute diligently.
	Motivated by extra money to be made legitimately in the field.
	Must be proficient in Driving.
	Must be resident in PH.


Application Closing Date: 1st May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Medical Sales Representative

Job Location: Uyo, Akwa Ibom 
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Candidates must possess a Degree in any of the following disciplines: Human Physiology, Anatomy, Pharmacology, Biochemistry, Microbiology or Biological Sciences.
	Have high moral/ ethical standards.
	Willing to take instructions and execute diligently.
	Motivated by extra money to be made legitimately in the field.
	Must be proficient in Driving.
	Must be resident in Uyo.


Application Closing Date: 1st April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos.Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration &ndash; whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented mid-level Accountant to manage daily financial operations and ensure accurate financial reporting within the organization.


Key Responsibilities


	Record and maintain daily financial transactions
	Prepare invoices, receipts, and other financial documents
	Manage accounts payable and receivable
	Perform bank reconciliations
	Assist in preparing monthly financial reports
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting or a related field
	2 &ndash; 4 years of relevant accounting experience
	ICAN (ACA) certification or in progress is required
	Basic proficiency in Excel and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage)


Key Skills:


	Strong attention to detail
	Good organizational skills
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;lillian.owoseni@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;hr@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Accountant Job at Luxsit Integration Limited




        
    

        
        Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos.Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration – whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented mid-level Accountant to manage daily financial operations and ensure accurate financial reporting within the organization.


Key Responsibilities


	Record and maintain daily financial transactions
	Prepare invoices, receipts, and other financial documents
	Manage accounts payable and receivable
	Perform bank reconciliations
	Assist in preparing monthly financial reports
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting or a related field
	2 – 4 years of relevant accounting experience
	ICAN (ACA) certification or in progress is required
	Basic proficiency in Excel and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage)


Key Skills:


	Strong attention to detail
	Good organizational skills
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Westfield Consulting Limited -&nbsp;Our client, with interest in Real Estate, Energy, Agriculture, Minning, Maritime and Aviation,&nbsp;is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Plays a crucial role in the financial management and reporting of the organization.
	Responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, preparing financial statements, analyzing financial data, and ensuring compliance with accounting principles and regulations.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and analyze financial statements, including balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements, regularly.
	Assist in the development of annual budgets and financial forecasts and monitor budgetary performance throughout the fiscal year.
	Analyze financial data, identify trends, and provide insights to management for decision-making purposes.
	Prepare and file tax returns, ensure compliance with tax regulations, and assist in tax planning strategies to minimize tax liabilities.
	Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits, provide necessary documentation and explanations, and address audit findings as required.
	Implement and maintain internal controls to safeguard assets, ensure the accuracy of financial data, and prevent fraud or errors.
	Provide financial advice and support to management on strategic initiatives, investment decisions, and business expansion plans.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree / HND in Accounting, Finance or a related field.
	3 years of proven experience as an accountant or in a similar role.
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and practices.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.


Salary
Very attractive and Negotiable.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualifiedcandidates should send their curent CV to:&nbsp;victor.allu@westfield-consulting.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Account Officer Job at Westfield Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Westfield Consulting Limited - Our client, with interest in Real Estate, Energy, Agriculture, Minning, Maritime and Aviation, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Plays a crucial role in the financial management and reporting of the organization.
	Responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, preparing financial statements, analyzing financial data, and ensuring compliance with accounting principles and regulations.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Prepare and analyze financial statements, including balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements, regularly.
	Assist in the development of annual budgets and financial forecasts and monitor budgetary performance throughout the fiscal year.
	Analyze financial data, identify trends, and provide insights to management for decision-making purposes.
	Prepare and file tax returns, ensure compliance with tax regulations, and assist in tax planning strategies to minimize tax liabilities.
	Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits, provide necessary documentation and explanations, and address audit findings as required.
	Implement and maintain internal controls to safeguard assets, ensure the accuracy of financial data, and prevent fraud or errors.
	Provide financial advice and support to management on strategic initiatives, investment decisions, and business expansion plans.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree / HND in Accounting, Finance or a related field.
	3 years of proven experience as an accountant or in a similar role.
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and practices.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.


Salary
Very attractive and Negotiable.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualifiedcandidates should send their curent CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Recovery Manager",
  "description": "Fina Trust Microfinance Bank, a member of LOLC Group with corporate Head Office in Colombo - Sri Lanka, is one of Nigeria&rsquo;s foremost Microfinance Banks. Its operating license was secured from the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) in September 2009 as a Microfinance Bank. Fina Trust Microfinance Bank has built a resounding success on excellent service delivery in a uniquely customer friendly environment through professional staff, leveraging on world-class technology. A continuous investment in information technology and in people sets the bank apart from others.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Recovery Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Recovery Manager is responsible for managing the bank&rsquo;s delinquent loan portfolio, driving effective collections and recovery strategies, and minimizing credit losses.
	The role focuses on reducing Portfolio at Risk (PAR) and Non-Performing Loans (NPLs), while ensuring compliance with regulatory standards and maintaining positive customer engagement where possible.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement recovery strategies for overdue loans
	Manage and supervise recovery teams and field collectors
	Drive collections and recovery performance across all loan segments
	Oversee legal recovery and repossession processes
	Monitor portfolio performance and provide recovery reports
	Collaborate with Credit, Risk, and Operations teams


Key KPIs


	Recovery Rate
	Reduction in PAR &amp; NPL
	Amount Recovered vs Target
	Cost of Recovery


Requirements


	7&ndash;10 years experience in credit/recovery (microfinance or banking) in Recovery
	Strong leadership, negotiation, and analytical skills
	Knowledge of CBN regulations and lending practices


Salary
N800,000 - N1,000,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified applicant should send their application&nbsp;hr@finatrustmfbank.com; CC:&nbsp;cdesilva@finatrustmfbank.com&nbsp;using the Job Position&nbsp; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-11",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Fina Trust Microfinance Bank"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

      "minValue": 600000,
      "maxValue": 900000,

Recovery Manager Job at Fina Trust Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Fina Trust Microfinance Bank, a member of LOLC Group with corporate Head Office in Colombo - Sri Lanka, is one of Nigeria’s foremost Microfinance Banks. Its operating license was secured from the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) in September 2009 as a Microfinance Bank. Fina Trust Microfinance Bank has built a resounding success on excellent service delivery in a uniquely customer friendly environment through professional staff, leveraging on world-class technology. A continuous investment in information technology and in people sets the bank apart from others.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Recovery Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	The Recovery Manager is responsible for managing the bank’s delinquent loan portfolio, driving effective collections and recovery strategies, and minimizing credit losses.
	The role focuses on reducing Portfolio at Risk (PAR) and Non-Performing Loans (NPLs), while ensuring compliance with regulatory standards and maintaining positive customer engagement where possible.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement recovery strategies for overdue loans
	Manage and supervise recovery teams and field collectors
	Drive collections and recovery performance across all loan segments
	Oversee legal recovery and repossession processes
	Monitor portfolio performance and provide recovery reports
	Collaborate with Credit, Risk, and Operations teams


Key KPIs


	Recovery Rate
	Reduction in PAR & NPL
	Amount Recovered vs Target
	Cost of Recovery


Requirements


	7–10 years experience in credit/recovery (microfinance or banking) in Recovery
	Strong leadership, negotiation, and analytical skills
	Knowledge of CBN regulations and lending practices


Salary
N800,000 - N1,000,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified applicant should send their application [email protected]; CC: [email protected] using the Job Position  as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
